q: How to move from 'Break-Fix' to 'Predictive Maintenance' without doubling headcount
diagnostic: Predictive maintenance does not require more people — it requires a smarter system. The Systems Architect agent sits atop IoT and FSM data, identifying failure patterns the standard logic misses and dispatching preemptive service specs.
answer: Predictive maintenance does not require more people — it requires a smarter system. The Systems Architect agent sits atop IoT and FSM data, identifying failure patterns the standard logic misses and dispatching preemptive service specs.
description: Brittle integration — as systems become more automated, they become more fragile. Geopolitical volatility compresses planning horizons to 48 hours.
symptom: One tariff change disrupts the quarter. One API outage stops the factory. The CEO no longer understands how their own company works.
